input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.1.1
            TITLE: all features and functions of the charger and charging shutdown circuit must be

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.1.1: All features and functions of the Charger and Charging Shutdown Circuit must be
EV.8.1.1 All features and functions of the Charger and Charging Shutdown Circuit must be 
demonstrated at Electrical Technical Inspection.  IN.4.1

final_answer: All features and functions of the Charger and Charging Shutdown Circuit must be demonstrated at Electrical Technical Inspection.
